title: Buttery Gooey German Date Bread
description: This paleo-friendly and buttery gooey date bread is perfect for a romantic evening. Made with ciabatta base and bhuna spices.
instructions: Spread softened butter evenly over the ciabatta slices, then sprinkle cinnamon on top if using.
In a mixing bowl, combine honey or agave nectar and chopped dates. Mix well until all dates are coated.
Arrange date mixture in center of each ciabatta slice with crusty side up.
If using dark chocolate chips, add them evenly to the tops of the date mixture on each slice.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and crispy around the edges but still soft inside. Check doneness by inserting a toothpick into the center; it should come out clean.
